textByHash.1f03e37c7be5c46239f279d6fc8490ed05c578fa: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?
textByHash.f4c33d16b95842a6e93ffa610c39c0502a84a14b: Ah, Martin sent you, why didn't you say so? I personally think that our problems are all down to the fact that we haven't had enough rain of late. It's plain to see - just look at the levels of the rivers.
textByHash.5bb8883d4859e575e0707e866f0a4317b222a7a0: We need more rain. I don't suppose you can do anything about that?
textByHash.8444ffc2b0be1b4a6738cb4690b8fb9bd1e865af: Well there you go then. Until you find out how to make it rain you're going to have a hard time solving our problems.
